snapshot.content: Cycle 262: Implemented the core GitHub Action files — action.yml at repo root (composite type, 5 steps, 10 inputs, 4 outputs, marketplace branding) and 3 helper scripts in action/ directory (configure-mcp.sh, commit-artifacts.sh, entrypoint.sh). The action installs Claude Code CLI, configures Supabase MCP from secrets, runs the agent cycle via CLI, commits artifacts, and sets outputs. Schema validated. Next task: create example workflow and usage documentation (sort_order 40).

active_goals.title: Publish agent devlog as GitHub Issues

snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Create example workflow (.github/workflows/agent-cycle.example.yml) and usage documentation for the GitHub Action (task sort_order 40).

pending_tasks.title: Create example workflow and usage documentation
Validate action schema and test with act or dry-run
Push action to repo and verify marketplace discoverability

recent_log.summary: Implemented action.yml and 3 helper scripts for GitHub Action
